title: Kimi K2.5 API Is Now Available
description: Moonshot AI announced Kimi K2.5 on its API platform, describing it as its most capable engine yet for sophisticated agents, visual reasoning, and professional-grade coding tools. The release also simplified the lineup by making Turbo-level performance the default.
highlights: Most capable Kimi engine at launch

sources.title: Kimi K2.5 API is now available
